query: select p.display_name customer,c.field_desc field,c.old_value_char old_value,c.new_value_char new_value, to_char(c.write_date,'yyyy-mm-dd HH:MI PM') change_time from mail_tracking_value c join ir_model_fields f on c.field=f.id join mail_message m on c.mail_message_id=m.id join res_partner p on m.res_id=p.id and f.name in ('email','phone') and f.model='res.partner' and c.old_value_char != c.new_value_char and c.create_date > now() - interval '5' minute order by c.id desc,c.create_date desc
subject: Customer Details Changed

query: SELECT id, name FROM res_partner WHERE email IS NULL LIMIT 20
subject: Partners missing email
